message:
fix(vdbe): add DISTINCT aggregate deduplication, AggStep1 opcode, and CAST text→integer prefix parsing

Three VDBE engine improvements:

- DISTINCT aggregates: AggregateContext now carries an optional HashSet
  for dedup. When p1!=0 on AggStep/AggStep1, arguments are encoded into
  a canonical byte key (type-tagged for collision safety) and tracked;
  duplicate or NULL arguments are skipped per SQL DISTINCT semantics.
- AggStep1: treated identically to AggStep (single-argument fast path).
- CAST to integer (affinity 'D'/'d'): text values now parse a leading
  numeric prefix ('123abc' → 123) instead of failing to 0, matching
  C SQLite's sqlite3Atoi64 behavior. Decimal prefixes are also handled
  via f64 truncation.
- CAST blob→text: now decodes as UTF-8 instead of hex literal, matching
  C SQLite's CAST(blob AS TEXT) semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
